title: [ImportVerilog] Preprocessor ignores singleUnit option
body:
Running multiple Verilog files through `circt-verilog` in preprocessor mode (`-E` option) ignores the `--single-unit` option. Single unit mode should carry macros of earlier files over into subsequent files. But the `preprocessVerilog` function in `ImportVerilog` creates a fresh new preprocessor for every file, regardless of whether `singleUnit` is set. Instead, if `singleUnit` is set, we should create one preprocessor that is used for all input files.

Shoutout to @dtzWill for finding this!
